_comment: SYNTHETIC PLACEHOLDER — an EXTERNAL reviewer replaces these with their own unseen items. 4 domains shown; add >=4 real ones. The tool refuses to build unless schema-valid AND decontam-clean against the corpus.

cases.prompt: PLACEHOLDER: a philosophy attribution question the model has not seen. Replace me.
PLACEHOLDER: a fresh logic puzzle with a checkable answer. Replace me.
PLACEHOLDER: a small self-contained coding task with a deterministic test. Replace me.
PLACEHOLDER: a history claim-verification question with a myth trap. Replace me.

rubric: flags the popular myth as unsupported
